questions.question: How do you access the native DOM event alongside custom arguments in a Vue handler?
options: By declaring an 'event' parameter in the method signature automatically
Using $event as a special variable in the inline handler expression
Calling this.$nativeEvent inside the handler method
Using the .native modifier on the v-on directive

questions.question: What does the .self event modifier do?
options: Removes the listener after the first trigger
Only fires if event.target is the element itself, not a child
Uses capture phase instead of bubbling
